CAREERS

The Robotics Design team is composed of creative and talented engineers, scientists, consultants, software developers and industrial designers who share a common passion for robotics and who believe in our goal of advancement through simplicity.

We are constantly on the lookout for the world’s brightest minds in robotics and we challenge people who envision the era of robotics as the next step of humanity to put their talents to good use.

For more information about careers with Robotics Design email us at: careers@roboticsdesign.qc.ca
